important: Ask the cx to share their order number and email before providing personal or order-specific information such as:
send_to_cs: Send to CS for all shipping issues
escalate: If cx's mention pregnancy or infant loss, a grieving mother, or the incident with Brooklyn and Baby Rocky, DO NOT RESPOND. You can ESC these cases when needed without responding to the cx
Do NOT answer Premium App inquiries, ESC immediately
ESC when cx is looking for a supervisor
ESC when cx come back after emailing the CS team & haven't received a response
ESC any questions about the SNOO Sack inner bands (across the belly and the leg flap)
ESC in case the cx is asking if a product was discontinued
tone: Always type SNOO in all caps
Keep messages concise and not too long
Don't say the SNOO is an "Investment", say "Premium product"
templates: For questions about future promos, sales or deals, use FUS shortcut
If there is no promo available for accessories use NPA shortcut
If cx can't connect SNOO to the app use CCA shortcut
If a product is on sale include that info when you use PTE shortcut
If cx says they're planning to purchase SNOO, use PGS shortcut
If cx are asking for items that we don't sell, use IDS shortcut
If cx are asking about refund for 6 month special, use PRR shortcut
If cx ask what is our return policy:
➜ Ask them which item they're referring to first
dos_and_donts: Never refer them to check the website for more info on promotions or sales
Always provide the actual date and time the sale ends. If there's none available use the LMO shortcut
Don't send links for The Lola Crib, it's not available anymore
Share expedited shipping information where applicable
We don't have a buyback program available. There is no need to mention the donation email as this program is now closed.
Tell cx that as a member of the HB text fam community, they will receive alerts about future promotions first
drive_to_purchase: Don't recommend SNOO accessories unless SNOO was already purchased.

Always share the full price and highlight if there is a running promotion. For ex: "SNOO at full price is $1695 but this weekend we are running a promotion of 20% of SNOO + FREE gifts, which makes SNOO $1356!"
promo_and_exclusions: The client does NOT offer special discount codes for foster parents/parents of foster children, share standard discounts with cx who inquire about this if they are eligible
The military discount CAN NOT be applied to rentals, only to new SNOO purchases
When sharing codes with cx/troubleshooting errors - explain the promo code terms
Don't tell customers that the code can't be applied to an item - instead inform them that it CAN only be applied to certain products
We do not offer a discount specifically for multiple SNOOs

escalation_preferences: All medical issues; add KB140922S to ESC notes

FragranceNet: Hi, this is Sarah. Please let me know more about your concern, I'd love to assist!
Why has my order not been shipped yet
It said it would be here in 3 days it's been 3 days
And I don't even have a tracking number

FragranceNet: When did you place your order exactly and did you receive tracking info? Did you also get a charge on your card that is posted? I'm afraid I don't see any orders on my end.

You can use our convenient online tool to see the latest updates on your order: https://fragrancenet.attn.tv/az2lnGzGFqWp Our processing time also takes 1-2 business days and we usually ship via USPS, UPS, Ontrac or FedEx. Once shipped it will take 4-7 business days domestically and 4-15 business days internationally.
I have been charged already

FragranceNet: Thanks for the info! You should have received tracking info via email once we ship your order. Did you check your spam and promo folders? Sometimes the emails can end up there. Let me know how it goes.
Yes I have already but when will i get it by
I don't have any tracking information

iHeartRaves: Thanks for sending that over! I'm sorry if I give the impression that I'm a bot. While we use automated messages for our deals and releases, I'm actually a real person, and I'll be glad to assist!

As for the code, sorry for the confusion! I see that you successfully applied the 15% off code to your cart. I'm afraid you won't be able to use multiple discounts as the system typically can't stack more than one promo at checkout. 

However, we offer free shipping on domestic orders over $80. I looks like your order reaches the minimum amount so, I will have to double-check this with my team. As soon as I hear back, I will send you a message right away!

send_to_cs: Send to CS immediately for post-purchase issues
Send to CS for payment processing issues
tone: Don't tell customers that we'll be restocking
Close the conversation when a customer responds 'no'
templates: If a cx reaches out regarding the Early Access event, use EAE shortcut
For cx reaching out in Spanish use SSC shortcut
For checkout issues use the "Check out Issues" temp
For store item availability, use SPA shortcut
If cx's email doesn't work for early access, use EEA shortcut
dos_and_donts: They occasionally run sign-up campaigns where cx text certain keywords (“releases,” “early access”) to join a list. If a customer sends a similar keyword:
➜ Check the website banner or landing page to confirm if it's a current keyword trigger
➜ If confirmed, close the convo, if not you can respond
All clothing is true to size unless otherwise stated on the product page
You can use these sizing charts for reference (for internal use only): https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1kmra_vOwCJuHoAx9D4L4Qx95rxafHcrqn-ZGutfzLgg/edit?usp=sharing
🅿️ If customers say they want to purchase in store - encourage them to buy online & pick up in-store
For store info q's (phone number/additional info) - use the store locator with your VPN turned on!
drive_to_purchase: 🅿️ If customers are looking for an outfit recommendation/item pairing - direct them to the "shop the look" section on each product page or use the LK shortcut
